settings.label: Free shipping threshold ($)
settings.info: Used by the cart page, cart drawer and the free-shipping progress bar. Set to 0 to hide.

settings.content: Shipping & Returns — shown on every product, identical

settings.label: Shipping & Returns text
settings.default: Ships within 24h. Enjoy easy 30-day returns on unworn items in their original packaging. Final-sale items are non-returnable.

settings.content: Materials & Care — default by product type (auto). A product's own metafield overrides these.

settings.label: Default — Jewelry
settings.default: Crafted from 925 sterling silver with 18ct gold vermeil plating. Keep dry, avoid perfumes and lotions, and store in the velvet pouch provided. Polish gently with a soft cloth. Backed by our 2-year warranty.

settings.label: Default — Beauty / Skincare
settings.default: Store away from direct sunlight and extreme heat. Patch-test before first use. For best results use within 12 months of opening. Cruelty-free and dermatologically tested.

settings.label: Default — Everything else
settings.default: Wipe clean with a soft, dry cloth. Avoid moisture and direct heat. Store in a cool, dry place to keep it looking beautiful for years.
